mapper.select: SELECT um.id, um.sender_id, um.receiver_id, um.content, um.is_read, um.create_time, su.nick_name as sender_name, su.avatar as sender_avatar, ru.nick_name as receiver_name FROM user_message um LEFT JOIN content_user su ON um.sender_id = su.user_id LEFT JOIN content_user ru ON um.receiver_id = ru.user_id WHERE (um.sender_id = #{userId1} AND um.receiver_id = #{userId2}) OR (um.sender_id = #{userId2} AND um.receiver_id = #{userId1}) ORDER BY um.create_time ASC

SELECT CASE WHEN um.sender_id = #{userId} THEN um.receiver_id ELSE um.sender_id END as friendId, cu.nick_name as friendName, cu.avatar as friendAvatar, um.content as lastContent, um.create_time as lastTime, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_message sub WHERE sub.receiver_id = #{userId} AND sub.sender_id = CASE WHEN um.sender_id = #{userId} THEN um.receiver_id ELSE um.sender_id END AND sub.is_read = '0') as unread FROM user_message um INNER JOIN ( SELECT MAX(id) as max_id FROM user_message WHERE sender_id = #{userId} OR receiver_id = #{userId} GROUP BY CASE WHEN sender_id = #{userId} THEN receiver_id ELSE sender_id END ) latest ON um.id = latest.max_id LEFT JOIN content_user cu ON CASE WHEN um.sender_id = #{userId} THEN um.receiver_id ELSE um.sender_id END = cu.user_id ORDER BY um.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_message (sender_id, receiver_id, content, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{content}, '0', sysdate())
mapper.update: UPDATE user_message SET is_read = '1' WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND sender_id = #{senderId} AND is_read = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM user_message WHERE receiver_id = #{receiverId} AND is_read = '0'
